bead.title: Record release target and readiness decision dispositions
bead.description:
Context: Before Axon can be called ready to use, the operator-owned release target and unresolved readiness decisions need durable dispositions. The plan requires confirm or revoke of the earlier 0.7.1 target versus a 0.4.x pilot target, plus implemented/deferred/out-of-scope status for audit retention/erasure, tamper-evident audit chain, and any whole-consumer workload deferrals. Use Erik/operator as the named decision owner unless a newer checked-in artifact names someone else.

In-scope files: PRD release alignment section, release notes/readiness review docs, and a small decision/disposition artifact under docs/helix if needed.

Out-of-scope: implementing the decided technical work; this bead records dispositions and owners.
bead.acceptance:
1. `python3 tests/test_release_readiness_claims.py --format text` passes.
2. `rg -n "release target disposition|audit retention|tamper-evident|whole-consumer|decision owner" docs/helix` returns the recorded dispositions.
3. `ddx doc validate` passes.
